news.t: Pictet Grows U.S. Lineup With 2 Active EM ETFs

overview.description: The Pictet Emerging Markets Debt ETF (EMFI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is actively managed and invests in emerging markets debt securities denominated primarily in US dollars. The strategy allocates across sovereign, quasi-sovereign, and corporate issuers using credit selection and macro views EMFI was launched on Apr 22, 2026 and is issued by Pictet.

data.title: Pictet Grows U.S. Lineup With 2 Active EM ETFs
data.text: Pictet Asset Management is deepening its footprint in the U.S. market with the debut of two active ETFs focused on emerging markets.  The Pictet Emerging Markets Debt ETF (EMFI) and the Pictet Emergin...
